name: KS_VARLIKLAR_RAPORU
definition:
CREATE VIEW [dbo].[KS_VARLIKLAR_RAPORU] AS

SELECT 'VERGİ BORÇLARI' VARLIKLAR, EMUHACC.CODE , EMUHACC.DEFINITION_ DEFINITION_ ,  EMUHACC.LOGICALREF CARDREF , 0 TOTTYP  , ISNULL(CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE,'TL') CURCODE , 
SUM(CASE WHEN DEBIT = 0 THEN -1 WHEN CREDIT = 0 THEN 1 END * ROUND((EMFLINE.TRNET),2)) BAKIYE,
ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1) CURRATE  

FROM LG_123_01_EMFLINE EMFLINE WITH(NOLOCK)  
INNER JOIN LG_123_EMUHACC EMUHACC WITH(NOLOCK) ON EMUHACC.LOGICALREF = EMFLINE.ACCOUNTREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CURRENCYLIST WITH(NOLOCK) ON (EMFLINE.TRCURR  =  CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE) AND (CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = 123)
LEFT JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_123 EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())

WHERE EMFLINE.CANCELLED = 0
AND (EMUHACC.CODE LIKE '360%' OR EMUHACC.CODE LIKE '361%')

GROUP BY EMUHACC.CODE , EMUHACC.DEFINITION_  ,  EMUHACC.LOGICALREF  , CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE , EXCHANGE.RATES1

UNION ALL

SELECT 'VERGİ BORÇLARI' VARLIKLAR, EMUHACC.CODE , EMUHACC.DEFINITION_ DEFINITION_ ,  EMUHACC.LOGICALREF CARDREF , 0 TOTTYP  , ISNULL(CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE,'TL') CURCODE , 
SUM(CASE WHEN DEBIT = 0 THEN -1 WHEN CREDIT = 0 THEN 1 END * ROUND((EMFLINE.TRNET),2)) BAKIYE,
ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1) CURRATE  

FROM LG_223_01_EMFLINE EMFLINE WITH(NOLOCK)  
INNER JOIN LG_223_EMUHACC EMUHACC WITH(NOLOCK) ON EMUHACC.LOGICALREF = EMFLINE.ACCOUNTREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CURRENCYLIST WITH(NOLOCK) ON (EMFLINE.TRCURR  =  CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE) AND (CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = 123)
LEFT JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_123 EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())

WHERE EMFLINE.CANCELLED = 0
AND (EMUHACC.CODE LIKE '360%' OR EMUHACC.CODE LIKE '361%')

GROUP BY EMUHACC.CODE , EMUHACC.DEFINITION_  ,  EMUHACC.LOGICALREF  , CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE , EXCHANGE.RATES1

UNION ALL

SELECT 'KASA BAKİYE' VARLIKLAR ,KSCARD.CODE , KSCARD.NAME ,  CASHTOT.CARDREF , CASHTOT.TOTTYPE TOTTYP  , ISNULL(CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE,'TL') CURCODE , ROUND(SUM(CASHTOT.DEBIT) ,2) - ROUND(SUM(CASHTOT.CREDIT),2) BAKIYE , ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1) CURRATE  

FROM LG_123_01_CSHTOTS CASHTOT WITH(NOLOCK) 
INNER JOIN LG_123_KSCARD KSCARD WITH(NOLOCK) ON CASHTOT.CARDREF = KSCARD.LOGICALREF
LEFT JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CURRENCYLIST WITH(NOLOCK) ON KSCARD.CCURRENCY = CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = 123
LEFT JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_123 EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())

WHERE (CASHTOT.CARDREF = 1) AND (CASHTOT.TOTTYPE = 1) 

GROUP BY KSCARD.CODE , KSCARD.NAME ,  CASHTOT.CARDREF , CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE , EXCHANGE.RATES1 , CASHTOT.TOTTYPE

UNION ALL


SELECT 'KASA BAKİYE' VARLIKLAR ,KSCARD.CODE , KSCARD.NAME ,  CASHTOT.CARDREF , CASHTOT.TOTTYPE TOTTYP  , ISNULL(CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE,'TL') CURCODE , ROUND(SUM(CASHTOT.DEBIT) ,2) - ROUND(SUM(CASHTOT.CREDIT),2) BAKIYE , ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1) CURRATE  

FROM LG_223_01_CSHTOTS CASHTOT WITH(NOLOCK) 
INNER JOIN LG_223_KSCARD KSCARD WITH(NOLOCK) ON CASHTOT.CARDREF = KSCARD.LOGICALREF
LEFT JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CURRENCYLIST WITH(NOLOCK) ON KSCARD.CCURRENCY = CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = 123
LEFT JOIN LG_EXCHANGE_123 EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())

WHERE (CASHTOT.CARDREF = 1) AND (CASHTOT.TOTTYPE = 1) 

GROUP BY KSCARD.CODE , KSCARD.NAME ,  CASHTOT.CARDREF , CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE , EXCHANGE.RATES1 , CASHTOT.TOTTYPE

UNION ALL

SELECT 'KARAVAN STOK' VARLIKLAR, REPLACE(ITEMS.CODE,'-01','') CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, MAX(ITEMS.CARDTYPE)  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,
2 * 
dbo.KS_RecipeCostFunc (REPLACE(ITEMS.CODE,'-01','') ) BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = -1 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()
WHERE ITEMS.CYPHCODE = 'KARAVAN' AND ITEMS.STGRPCODE <> 'ARABA'
GROUP BY REPLACE(ITEMS.CODE,'-01','') 
HAVING SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) > 0


UNION ALL

SELECT 'ARABA STOK' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, MAX(ITEMS.CARDTYPE)  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,

SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) * 
CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) = 0 THEN 
(CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float))
ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) END BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = -1 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()
WHERE ITEMS.STGRPCODE = 'ARABA'
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF
HAVING SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) > 0


UNION ALL

SELECT 'GEBZE STOK' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0))  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,

SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) * 
CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) = 0 THEN 
(CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float))
ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) END BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = 2 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()
WHERE ITEMS.CYPHCODE <> 'KARAVAN' AND ITEMS.STGRPCODE <> 'ARABA'
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF
HAVING SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT 'ÜRETİM STOK' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0))  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,
2 * 
SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) *
CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) = 0 THEN 
(CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float))
ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) END BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = 11 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()
WHERE ITEMS.CYPHCODE <> 'KARAVAN' AND ITEMS.STGRPCODE <> 'ARABA'
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF
HAVING SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT 'MONTAJ STOK' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0))  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,
2 * 
SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) *
CASE WHEN dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) = 0 THEN 
(CAST(CAST(
		ISNULL
		(CASE 
			WHEN (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) IS NULL 
				THEN (SELECT TOP 1 PRICE FROM LG_123_PRCLIST WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE CARDREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF ORDER BY BEGDATE DESC    )	
	
			ELSE (SELECT TOP 1 LINENET/AMOUNT FROM LG_123_01_STLINE WITH (NOLOCK) WHERE STOCKREF=ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND  PRICE>0 AND TRCODE IN (1) ORDER BY DATE_ DESC) 
	
		END ,0) AS  DECIMAL(18,2)) AS float))
ELSE dbo.KS_RecipeCostSubFunc ( ITEMS.LOGICALREF, 1) END BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK) 
LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = 5 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()
WHERE ITEMS.CYPHCODE <> 'KARAVAN' AND ITEMS.STGRPCODE <> 'ARABA'
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF
HAVING SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT 'DEMİRBAŞLAR' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, MAX(ITEMS.CARDTYPE)  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,
--ROUND((SUM(ISNULL(FAREGIST.INVALUE,0)	- ISNULL(FAREGIST.ACCUMDEPR,0))),2) AS BAKIYE,
ROUND((SUM(ISNULL(FAREGIST.INVALUE,0))),2) AS BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM
	[TIGER3]..LG_123_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK)
	LEFT OUTER JOIN [TIGER3]..LG_123_FAREGIST FAREGIST WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITEMS.LOGICALREF=FAREGIST.CRDREF 
	--LEFT OUTER JOIN [TIGER3]..LG_123_FAYEAR FAYEAR WITH(NOLOCK) ON FAREGIST.LOGICALREF=FAYEAR.FREGREF
	--LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = -1 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()

WHERE
	ITEMS.CODE<>'ÿ'
	AND ITEMS.CARDTYPE=4
	AND ITEMS.ACTIVE = 0
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF
HAVING ISNULL((SELECT SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) FROM LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = -1 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()),0) > -1

UNION ALL

SELECT 'DEMİRBAŞLAR' VARLIKLAR, ITEMS.CODE CODE , MAX(ITEMS.NAME) NAME , MAX(ITEMS.LOGICALREF) CARDREF, MAX(ITEMS.CARDTYPE)  TOTTYP, 'TL' CURCODE,
--ROUND((SUM(ISNULL(FAREGIST.INVALUE,0)	- ISNULL(FAREGIST.ACCUMDEPR,0))),2) AS BAKIYE,
ROUND((SUM(ISNULL(FAREGIST.INVALUE,0))),2) AS BAKIYE,
1 CURRATE

FROM
	[TIGER3]..LG_223_ITEMS ITEMS WITH(NOLOCK)
	LEFT OUTER JOIN [TIGER3]..LG_223_FAREGIST FAREGIST WITH(NOLOCK) ON ITEMS.LOGICALREF=FAREGIST.CRDREF 
	--LEFT OUTER JOIN [TIGER3]..LG_223_FAYEAR FAYEAR WITH(NOLOCK) ON FAREGIST.LOGICALREF=FAYEAR.FREGREF
	--LEFT OUTER JOIN LV_223_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) ON STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = -1 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()

WHERE
	ITEMS.CODE<>'ÿ'
	AND ITEMS.CARDTYPE=4
	AND ITEMS.ACTIVE = 0
GROUP BY ITEMS.CODE,ITEMS.LOGICALREF
--HAVING (SELECT SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) FROM LV_123_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = -1 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()) > 0
HAVING ISNULL((SELECT SUM(ISNULL(STINVTOT.ONHAND, 0)) FROM LV_223_01_STINVTOT STINVTOT WITH(NOLOCK) WHERE STINVTOT.STOCKREF = ITEMS.LOGICALREF AND STINVTOT.INVENNO = -1 AND STINVTOT.DATE_ <= GETDATE()),0) > -1

UNION ALL



SELECT 'TEDARİKÇİ BORÇ' VARLIKLAR, TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ , 1 CARDREF , 1 TOTTYP , 'TL' CURCODE , SUM(BAKIYE) BAKIYE , 1 CURRATE  
FROM (SELECT CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ ,ROUND(SUM(CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN  CTRNS.AMOUNT ELSE CTRNS.AMOUNT*-1 END),2) AS  'BAKIYE'
FROM LG_123_01_CLFLINE CTRNS
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLNTC ON CTRNS.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON CUR.FIRMNR=123 AND CUR.CURTYPE=CTRNS.TRCURR
WHERE (CTRNS.CANCELLED <> 1)
AND (CTRNS.DATE_ <=GETDATE())
AND CLNTC.CODE LIKE '320%'
AND CLNTC.SPECODE5 <> 'GST'
GROUP BY CTRNS.CLIENTREF , CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ , CUR.CURTYPE , CUR.CURCODE) AS TBL
GROUP BY TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_
HAVING SUM(BAKIYE) < 0


UNION ALL


SELECT 'TEDARİKÇİ BORÇ' VARLIKLAR, TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ , 1 CARDREF , 1 TOTTYP , 'TL' CURCODE , SUM(BAKIYE) BAKIYE , 1 CURRATE  
FROM (SELECT CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ ,ROUND(SUM(CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN  CTRNS.AMOUNT ELSE CTRNS.AMOUNT*-1 END),2) AS  'BAKIYE'
FROM LG_223_01_CLFLINE CTRNS
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_223_CLCARD CLNTC ON CTRNS.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON CUR.FIRMNR=223 AND CUR.CURTYPE=CTRNS.TRCURR
WHERE (CTRNS.CANCELLED <> 1)
AND (CTRNS.DATE_ <=GETDATE())
AND CLNTC.CODE LIKE '320%'
AND CLNTC.SPECODE5 <> 'GST'
GROUP BY CTRNS.CLIENTREF , CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ , CUR.CURTYPE , CUR.CURCODE) AS TBL
GROUP BY TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_
HAVING SUM(BAKIYE) < 0


UNION ALL

SELECT 'VERİLEN AVANSLAR' VARLIKLAR, TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ , 1 CARDREF , 1 TOTTYP , 'TL' CURCODE , SUM(BAKIYE) BAKIYE , 1 CURRATE  
FROM (SELECT CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ ,ROUND(SUM(CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN  CTRNS.AMOUNT ELSE CTRNS.AMOUNT*-1 END),2) AS  'BAKIYE'
FROM LG_123_01_CLFLINE CTRNS
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLNTC ON CTRNS.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON CUR.FIRMNR=123 AND CUR.CURTYPE=CTRNS.TRCURR
WHERE (CTRNS.CANCELLED <> 1)
AND (CTRNS.DATE_ <=GETDATE())
AND CLNTC.CODE LIKE '320%'
AND CLNTC.SPECODE5 <> 'GST'
GROUP BY CTRNS.CLIENTREF , CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ , CUR.CURTYPE , CUR.CURCODE) AS TBL
GROUP BY TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_
HAVING SUM(BAKIYE) > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT 'VERİLEN AVANSLAR' VARLIKLAR, TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ , 1 CARDREF , 1 TOTTYP , 'TL' CURCODE , SUM(BAKIYE) BAKIYE , 1 CURRATE  
FROM (SELECT CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ ,ROUND(SUM(CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN  CTRNS.AMOUNT ELSE CTRNS.AMOUNT*-1 END),2) AS  'BAKIYE'
FROM LG_223_01_CLFLINE CTRNS
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_223_CLCARD CLNTC ON CTRNS.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON CUR.FIRMNR=223 AND CUR.CURTYPE=CTRNS.TRCURR
WHERE (CTRNS.CANCELLED <> 1)
AND (CTRNS.DATE_ <=GETDATE())
AND CLNTC.CODE LIKE '320%'
AND CLNTC.SPECODE5 <> 'GST'
GROUP BY CTRNS.CLIENTREF , CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ , CUR.CURTYPE , CUR.CURCODE) AS TBL
GROUP BY TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_
HAVING SUM(BAKIYE) > 0


UNION ALL

SELECT 'ALINAN AVANS' VARLIKLAR, TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ , 1 CARDREF , 1 TOTTYP , 'TL' CURCODE , SUM(BAKIYE) BAKIYE , 1 CURRATE  
FROM (SELECT CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ ,ROUND(SUM(CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN  CTRNS.AMOUNT ELSE CTRNS.AMOUNT*-1 END),2) AS  'BAKIYE'
FROM LG_123_01_CLFLINE CTRNS
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLNTC ON CTRNS.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON CUR.FIRMNR=123 AND CUR.CURTYPE=CTRNS.TRCURR
WHERE (CTRNS.CANCELLED <> 1)
AND (CTRNS.DATE_ <=GETDATE())
AND CLNTC.CODE LIKE '120%'
AND CLNTC.SPECODE5 <> 'GST'
GROUP BY CTRNS.CLIENTREF , CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ , CUR.CURTYPE , CUR.CURCODE) AS TBL
GROUP BY TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_
HAVING SUM(BAKIYE) < 0

UNION ALL

SELECT 'ALINAN AVANS' VARLIKLAR, TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ , 1 CARDREF , 1 TOTTYP , 'TL' CURCODE , SUM(BAKIYE) BAKIYE , 1 CURRATE  
FROM (SELECT CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ ,ROUND(SUM(CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN  CTRNS.AMOUNT ELSE CTRNS.AMOUNT*-1 END),2) AS  'BAKIYE'
FROM LG_223_01_CLFLINE CTRNS
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_223_CLCARD CLNTC ON CTRNS.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON CUR.FIRMNR = 223 AND CUR.CURTYPE=CTRNS.TRCURR
WHERE (CTRNS.CANCELLED <> 1)
AND (CTRNS.DATE_ <=GETDATE())
AND CLNTC.CODE LIKE '120%'
AND CLNTC.SPECODE5 <> 'GST'
GROUP BY CTRNS.CLIENTREF , CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ , CUR.CURTYPE , CUR.CURCODE) AS TBL
GROUP BY TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_
HAVING SUM(BAKIYE) < 0

UNION ALL


SELECT 'CARİ ALACAKLAR' VARLIKLAR, TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ , 1 CARDREF , 1 TOTTYP , 'TL' CURCODE , SUM(BAKIYE) BAKIYE , 1 CURRATE  
FROM (SELECT CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ ,ROUND(SUM(CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN  CTRNS.AMOUNT ELSE CTRNS.AMOUNT*-1 END),2) AS  'BAKIYE'
FROM LG_123_01_CLFLINE CTRNS
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_123_CLCARD CLNTC ON CTRNS.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON CUR.FIRMNR=123 AND CUR.CURTYPE=CTRNS.TRCURR
WHERE (CTRNS.CANCELLED <> 1)
AND (CTRNS.DATE_ <=GETDATE())
AND CLNTC.CODE LIKE '120%'
AND CLNTC.SPECODE5 <> 'GST'
GROUP BY CTRNS.CLIENTREF , CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ , CUR.CURTYPE , CUR.CURCODE) AS TBL
GROUP BY TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_
HAVING SUM(BAKIYE) > 0



UNION ALL


SELECT 'CARİ ALACAKLAR' VARLIKLAR, TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_ , 1 CARDREF , 1 TOTTYP , 'TL' CURCODE , SUM(BAKIYE) BAKIYE , 1 CURRATE  
FROM (SELECT CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ ,ROUND(SUM(CASE SIGN WHEN 0 THEN  CTRNS.AMOUNT ELSE CTRNS.AMOUNT*-1 END),2) AS  'BAKIYE'
FROM LG_223_01_CLFLINE CTRNS
LEFT OUTER JOIN LG_223_CLCARD CLNTC ON CTRNS.CLIENTREF = CLNTC.LOGICALREF
LEFT OUTER JOIN L_CURRENCYLIST CUR ON CUR.FIRMNR=223 AND CUR.CURTYPE=CTRNS.TRCURR
WHERE (CTRNS.CANCELLED <> 1)
AND (CTRNS.DATE_ <=GETDATE())
AND CLNTC.CODE LIKE '120%'
AND CLNTC.SPECODE5 <> 'GST'
GROUP BY CTRNS.CLIENTREF , CLNTC.CODE , CLNTC.DEFINITION_ , CUR.CURTYPE , CUR.CURCODE) AS TBL
GROUP BY TBL.CODE , TBL.DEFINITION_
HAVING SUM(BAKIYE) > 0

UNION ALL

SELECT 'BANKA BAKİYE' VARLIKLAR, BANKACC.CODE , BANKACC.DEFINITION_ ,  123 CARDREF , BNCARD.LOGICALREF TOTTYP  , 
                    
                      (CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN 'TL' ELSE L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE END) AS CURCODE,
					  SUM((CASE BNFLINE.SIGN WHEN 1 THEN ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END),2)
                      * - 1 ELSE ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END),2) END)) AS BAKIYE,

					  MAX(ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1)) CURRATE  

FROM         dbo.LG_123_01_BNFLINE AS BNFLINE WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_123_BNCARD AS BNCARD WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BANKREF = BNCARD.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_123_BANKACC AS BANKACC WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BNACCREF = BANKACC.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_123_01_BNFICHE AS BNFICHE WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.SOURCEFREF = BNFICHE.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_123_BANKACC AS BANKACC1 WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFICHE.BNACCOUNTREF = BANKACC1.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.L_CURRENCYLIST AS L_CURRENCYLIST WITH (NOLOCK) ON L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE = BNFLINE.TRCURR AND L_CURRENCYLIST.FIRMNR = '123' LEFT OUTER JOIN
					  dbo.LG_EXCHANGE_123 AS EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())
WHERE BNFLINE.CANCELLED = 0 
AND BANKACC.CARDTYPE IN (1,3)
GROUP BY  BANKACC.CODE , BANKACC.DEFINITION_ ,  BANKACC.LOGICALREF  , BNCARD.LOGICALREF , BNFLINE.TRCURR , L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE 

UNION ALL

SELECT 'BANKA BAKİYE' VARLIKLAR, BANKACC.CODE , BANKACC.DEFINITION_ ,  223 CARDREF , BNCARD.LOGICALREF TOTTYP  , 
                    
                      (CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN 'TL' ELSE L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE END) AS CURCODE,
					  SUM((CASE BNFLINE.SIGN WHEN 1 THEN ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END),2)
                      * - 1 ELSE ROUND((CASE BNFLINE.TRCURR WHEN 0 THEN BNFLINE.AMOUNT ELSE BNFLINE.TRNET END),2) END)) AS BAKIYE,

					  MAX(ISNULL(EXCHANGE.RATES1,1)) CURRATE  

FROM         dbo.LG_223_01_BNFLINE AS BNFLINE WITH (NOLOCK) LEFT OUTER JOIN
                      dbo.LG_223_BNCARD AS BNCARD WITH (NOLOCK) ON BNFLINE.BANKREF = BNCARD.LOGICALREF LEFT OUTER JOIN

					  dbo.LG_EXCHANGE_123 AS EXCHANGE WITH(NOLOCK) ON EXCHANGE.CRTYPE = L_CURRENCYLIST.CURTYPE AND EXCHANGE.EDATE = CONVERT(DATE,GETDATE())
WHERE BNFLINE.CANCELLED = 0 
AND BANKACC.CARDTYPE IN (1,3)
GROUP BY  BANKACC.CODE , BANKACC.DEFINITION_ ,  BANKACC.LOGICALREF  , BNCARD.LOGICALREF , BNFLINE.TRCURR , L_CURRENCYLIST.CURCODE


UNION ALL
